title: ジャパンCの後に・ライバルだから

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Time to find out who will come out on top! Who
will be first at the end of this thrilling race?!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Ooh, I've got goosebumps!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Amazing. I had no idea it would be this thrilling to
watch you go all-out!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: No, it's not just you...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
It's the two of you running together that makes
this so exciting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Y-you're strong!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...So I am. This is the kind of strength your rival
possesses, Chiyo.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. Whenever I run with you, it feels like my
own future gets dimmer...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Chiyo? Can I ask you a question?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Do you still want to run with me?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Absolutely!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Of course I do! I can't let things end with a loss!
I'm going to win next time!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
After all, I'm your rival, Maruzen! I'm Sakura
Chiyono O!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...That's right.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You are!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You, Sakura Chiyono O, are my wonderful rival!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll take you on any time you want a rematch. As
long as you keep running, there'll always be a
chance that you'll surpass me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I won't just let you win! Let's face off again in
the future, Chiyo.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Oh, and Chiyo? There's one more thing I
want to say.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I... I had so much fun! That was the best race I've ever had in my life!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Did you have fun too, Chiyo?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I did!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I hope we'll have even more fun
together from now on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This will surely not be the last time they race one
another.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As long as they are rivals, as long as they are
running... they'll have countless more races to
share.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Hic! Next time... I swear I'll win!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll get stronger... and stronger! I absolutely won't
lose!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Until that moment comes, she can cry as much as
she wants. I know those aren't tears of regret, but
tears of frustration at losing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And once her tears are all dried up, she'll surely
be back on the path toward her future.
